mapper.sql: select s.schedule_id, s.doctor_id, d.dept_id, d.doctor_name, d.level_id, rl.level_name, rl.fee, s.schedule_date, s.time_slot, s.max_number, s.reserved_number, greatest(ifnull(s.max_number, 0) - ifnull(s.reserved_number, 0), 0) as available_number, s.status, s.create_time, s.update_time from schedule s left join doctor d on d.doctor_id = s.doctor_id left join regist_level rl on rl.level_id = d.level_id
mapper.select: select s.schedule_id as scheduleId, s.doctor_id as doctorId, d.doctor_name as doctorName, d.dept_id as deptId, sd.dept_name as deptName, d.level_id as levelId, rl.level_name as levelName, s.schedule_date as scheduleDate, s.time_slot as timeSlot, s.max_number as maxNumber, s.reserved_number as reservedNumber, greatest(ifnull(s.max_number, 0) - ifnull(s.reserved_number, 0), 0) as availableNumber, s.status as status, 0 as `generated` from schedule s inner join doctor d on d.doctor_id = s.doctor_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = d.dept_id left join regist_level rl on rl.level_id = d.level_id where s.schedule_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} order by s.schedule_date, case s.time_slot when 'morning' then 1 when 'afternoon' then 2 when 'evening' then 3 else 9 end, d.dept_id, d.level_id desc, d.doctor_id
mapper.insert:
insert into schedule
doctor_id, schedule_date, time_slot, max_number, reserved_number, status, create_time, update_time,
#{doctorId}, #{scheduleDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{maxNumber}, #{reservedNumber}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from schedule where schedule_id in
#{scheduleId}
mapper.update: update schedule set reserved_number = reserved_number + 1, status = case when reserved_number + 1 >= max_number then '1' else status end, update_time = now() where schedule_id = #{scheduleId} and reserved_number < max_number
update schedule set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
